requirement_topic.en: Communications Protocol — OCPP Preferred vs GB/T 27930-2023 CAN (Incompatible)
requirement_topic.zh: 通信协议——OCPP优选与GB/T 27930-2023 CAN（不兼容）
requirement_topic.zht: 通訊協議——OCPP優選與GB/T 27930-2023 CAN（不兼容）

summary.en: Brunei has no confirmed published mandatory EV-charger back-office communication protocol standard as of 2026-06. For networked public EV chargers, OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — specifically OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 — is the international standard used across IEC-aligned markets in ASEAN and globally, and is the expected protocol for interoperable EV charging infrastructure in Brunei's IEC-aligned ecosystem. OCPP enables remote monitoring, energy management, authentication, fault notification, and tariff management through a central management system (CMS). Any public EV charging network operator or system integrator in Brunei is expected to require OCPP-compatible equipment for network interoperability.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月，文莱未发现已确认发布的电动汽车充电桩后台通信协议强制标准。对于联网公共电动汽车充电桩，OCPP（开放充电点协议）——特别是OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1——是东盟IEC体系市场及全球范围内采用的国际标准，也是文莱IEC体系生态中可互操作电动汽车充电基础设施的预期协议。OCPP通过中央管理系统（CMS）支持远程监控、能源管理、身份认证、故障通知和计费管理。文莱任何公共电动汽车充电网络运营商或系统集成商均预期要求设备支持OCPP以实现网络互操作。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月，汶萊未發現已確認發布的電動汽車充電樁後台通訊協議強制標準。對於聯網公共電動汽車充電樁，OCPP（開放充電點協議）——特別是OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1——是東盟IEC體系市場及全球範圍內採用的國際標準，也是汶萊IEC體系生態中可互操作電動汽車充電基礎設施的預期協議。OCPP通過中央管理系統（CMS）支持遠程監控、能源管理、身份認證、故障通知和計費管理。汶萊任何公共電動汽車充電網絡運營商或系統集成商均預期要求設備支持OCPP以實現網絡互操作。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) 1.6 / 2.0.1 — back-office communication standard for networked EV chargers (Open Charge Alliance)
IEC 63584 — International standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging
IEC 61851-1:2017 — control pilot signaling framework underlying OCPP-integrated charger design
No confirmed mandatory Brunei EV-charger communication protocol regulation published as of 2026-06

summary.en: China DC fast chargers use GB/T 27930-2023 as the mandatory communication protocol between the off-board charger and the electric vehicle battery management system (BMS). GB/T 27930 is a CAN bus protocol operating at the physical DC charging connector level and is not a back-office OCPP protocol substitute — they serve different layers of the charging communication stack. GB/T 27930 is incompatible with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 used in CCS2 DC stations and cannot communicate with an OCPP central management system without a protocol gateway.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与电动汽车电池管理系统（BMS）之间通信的强制协议。GB/T 27930是在物理直流充电接口层面运行的CAN总线协议，不是后台OCPP协议的替代品——两者服务于充电通信栈的不同层次。GB/T 27930与CCS2直流充电站所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118不兼容，且未经协议网关无法与OCPP中央管理系统通信。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與電動汽車電池管理系統（BMS）之間通訊的強制協議。GB/T 27930是在物理直流充電接口層面運行的CAN總線協議，不是後台OCPP協議的替代品——兩者服務於充電通訊棧的不同層次。GB/T 27930與CCS2直流充電站所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118不兼容，且未經協議網關無法與OCPP中央管理系統通訊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles (CAN bus, DC vehicle communication only)
China operator-specific back-office protocols (proprietary or OCPP-based depending on operator)

gap.en: Exporters targeting Brunei networked EV charger deployments must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 for back-office CMS communication; (2) GB/T 27930 DC vehicle communication is replaced with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2 DC chargers; (3) OCPP version required by the specific Brunei network operator or project is confirmed before firmware configuration; (4) back-office API testing and site commissioning are completed before activation; (5) no confirmed mandatory Brunei protocol regulation exists as of 2026-06 — confirm with the operator or project owner before final specification.
gap.zh: 面向文莱联网电动汽车充电桩部署的出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1用于后台CMS通信；(2) CCS2直流充电桩将GB/T 27930直流车辆通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；(3) 在固件配置前确认具体文莱网络运营商或项目所要求的OCPP版本；(4) 激活前完成后台API测试和现场调试；(5) 截至2026年6月，不存在已确认的文莱强制协议法规——最终规格确认前须与运营商或项目业主确认。
gap.zht: 面向汶萊聯網電動汽車充電樁部署的出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1用於後台CMS通訊；(2) CCS2直流充電樁將GB/T 27930直流車輛通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；(3) 在固件配置前確認具體汶萊網絡運營商或項目所要求的OCPP版本；(4) 激活前完成後台API測試和現場調試；(5) 截至2026年6月，不存在已確認的汶萊強制協議法規——最終規格確認前須與運營商或項目業主確認。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed mandatory Brunei EV-charger communication protocol regulation as of 2026-06; OCPP 1.6 / 2.0.1 is the expected IEC-aligned ecosystem standard for networked public chargers; confirm with the specific operator or project owner
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930-2023 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging vehicle communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for OCPP back-office integration in Brunei

source.publisher: Open Charge Alliance — OCPP Protocol Specification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brunei has no confirmed mandatory EV-charger communication protocol regulation as of 2026-06. For networked public chargers, OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1 is the expected interoperability standard across IEC-aligned markets. GB/T 27930 CAN-bus DC vehicle communication is incompatible with OCPP CMS integration and with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 required for CCS2 DC charging. Confirm the OCPP version with the Brunei operator or project owner before final firmware specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月，文莱无已确认的电动汽车充电桩强制通信协议法规。对于联网公共充电桩，OCPP 1.6或2.0.1是IEC体系市场预期的互操作标准。GB/T 27930 CAN总线直流车辆通信与OCPP CMS集成不兼容，也与CCS2直流充电所要求的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118不兼容。在最终固件规格确定前须与文莱运营商或项目业主确认OCPP版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月，汶萊無已確認的電動汽車充電樁強制通訊協議法規。對於聯網公共充電樁，OCPP 1.6或2.0.1是IEC體系市場預期的互操作標準。GB/T 27930 CAN總線直流車輛通訊與OCPP CMS集成不兼容，也與CCS2直流充電所要求的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118不兼容。在最終固件規格確定前須與汶萊運營商或項目業主確認OCPP版本。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Requirements — IEC 61000 Series vs GB/T 18487 EMC Provisions (Re-testing Required)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC要求——IEC 61000系列与GB/T 18487 EMC条款（须重新测试）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC要求——IEC 61000系列與GB/T 18487 EMC條款（須重新測試）

summary.en: Brunei's electrical equipment framework is aligned with IEC standards through the Department of Electrical Services (DES). Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements for EV supply equipment follow the IEC 61000 series, specifically IEC 61851-21-1 (EMC requirements for on-board EV charging and IEC 61000 emissions and immunity provisions). IEC 61000-3-2 (current harmonics), IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations), IEC 61000-4 series (immunity testing), and IEC 61000-6 series (generic emissions/immunity) are the applicable EMC frameworks. No confirmed Brunei-specific mandatory EMC regulation for EVSE has been published as of 2026-06.
summary.zh: 文莱通过电气服务部（DES）使电气设备框架与IEC标准体系一致。电动汽车供电设备的电磁兼容（EMC）要求遵循IEC 61000系列，特别是IEC 61851-21-1（车载电动汽车充电EMC要求及IEC 61000辐射和抗扰度条款）。适用的EMC框架包括IEC 61000-3-2（电流谐波）、IEC 61000-3-3（电压波动）、IEC 61000-4系列（抗扰度测试）及IEC 61000-6系列（通用辐射/抗扰度）。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布的EVSE强制EMC法规。
summary.zht: 汶萊通過電氣服務部（DES）使電氣設備框架與IEC標準體系一致。電動汽車供電設備的電磁兼容（EMC）要求遵循IEC 61000系列，特別是IEC 61851-21-1（車載電動汽車充電EMC要求及IEC 61000輻射和抗擾度條款）。適用的EMC框架包括IEC 61000-3-2（電流諧波）、IEC 61000-3-3（電壓波動）、IEC 61000-4系列（抗擾度測試）及IEC 61000-6系列（通用輻射/抗擾度）。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布的EVSE強制EMC法規。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-1: EMC requirements for conductive connection to the AC/DC supply network
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes and flicker
IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques
IEC 61000-6 series — Generic standards — Emission and immunity
Department of Electrical Services (DES) — may assess EMC adequacy as part of electrical installation approval

summary.en: China EV charger EMC requirements are incorporated within GB/T 18487.1-2023 and associated national standards. China EMC test standards correspond to national GB standards that are largely harmonized with IEC 61000, but the test procedures, limits, and accreditation framework differ at the laboratory level. A China domestic EMC test report to GB/T standards does not directly satisfy an IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-1 accredited EMC requirement without an equivalence review or re-testing at an ILAC-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩EMC要求包含在GB/T 18487.1-2023及相关国家标准中。中国EMC测试标准对应在很大程度上与IEC 61000协调的国家GB标准，但测试程序、限值和实验室认可框架在实验室层面有所不同。仅凭GB/T标准的中国国内EMC测试报告，在未经等效性审查或ILAC认可实验室重新测试的情况下，不能直接满足IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-1认可EMC要求。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁EMC要求包含在GB/T 18487.1-2023及相關國家標準中。中國EMC測試標準對應在很大程度上與IEC 61000協調的國家GB標準，但測試程序、限值和實驗室認可框架在實驗室層面有所不同。僅憑GB/T標準的中國國內EMC測試報告，在未經等效性審查或ILAC認可實驗室重新測試的情況下，不能直接滿足IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-1認可EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — includes EMC provisions for China domestic EV charger design
GB 17625.1 — China harmonics emission standard (broadly aligned to IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17626 series — China immunity testing standards (broadly aligned to IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) IEC 61851-21-1 and IEC 61000 series accredited EMC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory for Brunei-facing EVSE documentation; (2) a clause-level equivalence review if China GB domestic EMC test reports are to be considered as supporting evidence — do not assume automatic equivalence; (3) harmonic distortion evidence per IEC 61000-3-2 for chargers connected to the Brunei 230/400 V 50 Hz grid; (4) EMC test evidence covering the specific operating frequencies and power levels of the Brunei-market version of the charger. Re-testing at an IEC-accredited laboratory is typically required when the product configuration, power level, or connector type changes between the GB/T-tested version and the Brunei-export version.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) 面向文莱EVSE文件，提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000系列认可EMC测试报告；(2) 若中国GB国内EMC测试报告作为支持证据，须进行逐条等效性审查——不得假设自动等效；(3) 针对接入文莱230/400 V 50 Hz电网的充电桩，提供符合IEC 61000-3-2的谐波失真证据；(4) EMC测试证据须覆盖文莱市场版充电桩的特定工作频率和功率等级。当GB/T测试版本与文莱出口版本在产品配置、功率等级或接口类型上发生变化时，通常须在IEC认可实验室重新测试。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) 面向汶萊EVSE文件，提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000系列認可EMC測試報告；(2) 若中國GB國內EMC測試報告作為支持證據，須進行逐條等效性審查——不得假設自動等效；(3) 針對接入汶萊230/400 V 50 Hz電網的充電樁，提供符合IEC 61000-3-2的諧波失真證據；(4) EMC測試證據須覆蓋汶萊市場版充電樁的特定工作頻率和功率等級。當GB/T測試版本與汶萊出口版本在產品配置、功率等級或接口類型上發生變化時，通常須在IEC認可實驗室重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed mandatory Brunei EVSE-specific EMC regulation published as of 2026-06; IEC 61000 series compliance is the expected IEC-aligned EMC framework for EVSE in Brunei; DES may assess EMC adequacy during installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 EMC provisions apply to China domestic charger design; not directly equivalent to IEC 61851-21-1 / IEC 61000 accredited evidence without re-testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB/T domestic EMC test reports are not a direct substitute for IEC 61851-21-1 / IEC 61000 accredited EMC evidence required for Brunei-facing EVSE documentation. Re-testing at an ILAC-accredited laboratory is typically required, especially when the product configuration changes between the China-market and Brunei-export versions. No confirmed mandatory Brunei EMC regulation for EVSE exists as of 2026-06; confirm with DES and the local importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T国内EMC测试报告不能直接替代面向文莱EVSE文件所需的IEC 61851-21-1 / IEC 61000认可EMC证据。通常须在ILAC认可实验室重新测试，尤其是产品配置在中国市场版和文莱出口版之间发生变化时。截至2026年6月，不存在已确认的文莱EVSE强制EMC法规；须向DES及当地进口商确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T國內EMC測試報告不能直接替代面向汶萊EVSE文件所需的IEC 61851-21-1 / IEC 61000認可EMC證據。通常須在ILAC認可實驗室重新測試，尤其是產品配置在中國市場版和汶萊出口版之間發生變化時。截至2026年6月，不存在已確認的汶萊EVSE強制EMC法規；須向DES及當地進口商確認。
